overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest trail through meadows and pine forests, encountering wild horses and approaching an ancient stone monolith with a campsite at its base. The scene features vibrant summer vegetation and dynamic lighting.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path through a meadow with tall pine trees and colorful wildflowers

entered.detail: Dense cluster of tall evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the trail
Dense cluster of tall evergreen pine trees lining the right side of the trail
Patches of yellow and purple wildflowers growing alongside the path
Winding dirt trail through the forest with grass edges
Snow-capped mountain peak visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path through a sunlit forest meadow. Tall pine trees frame both sides of the trail while colorful wildflowers dot the grassy verges. A distant snow-capped mountain is visible ahead through the trees.

events.description: Two brown horses appear grazing on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking uphill, passing wild horses grazing on the hillside

notable_agents.action: Two brown horses standing and grazing on the grassy hillside beside the path

entered.detail: Two brown wild horses standing among the grass and flowers
Tall stacked stone structure visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: As Geralt ascends the hillside trail, two brown horses appear grazing on the right. The path continues upward through denser forest, and a tall ancient stone monolith becomes visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: Path becomes steeper and rockier as character ascends toward the monolith

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbs the increasingly rocky path toward the large stone structure ahead

entered.detail: Exposed rock faces and gravel replacing the dirt path surface

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes steeper and rockier as Geralt ascends toward the massive stone monolith. The horses are left behind, and the vegetation thins slightly as the character approaches the ancient stacked stone structure.

events.description: Character arrives at campsite with burning fire and seated NPC at the base of the monolith

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaches the campsite at the monolith base, observing the NPC by the fire

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on the ground near the campfire, possibly resting or tending the fire

entered.detail: Burning campfire with visible flames and smoke
Wooden barrels and crates near the campsite

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches the base of the massive stone monolith where a small campsite is set up. A burning fire illuminates the area, and an NPC sits nearby. Wooden barrels are stacked to the left as the character enters the clearing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding forest trail that ascends from a sunlit meadow toward an ancient stone monolith. It begins with Geralt walking through a vibrant meadow framed by tall pine trees and colorful wildflowers, with a snow-capped mountain visible in the far distance. As the path climbs the hillside, the scenery shifts toward a denser forest where two brown horses graze by the roadside before a massive stone structure emerges on the horizon. The terrain then becomes steeper and rockier, causing the vegetation to thin as the camera follows the character upward and leaves the horses behind. Finally, the scene opens into a clearing at the base of the monolith, where the camera settles on a small campsite featuring a burning fire, stacked wooden barrels, and a seated NPC.
